docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ALIFF, GARY
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY FLORES, MARIO ALIFF, GARY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MARIO FLORES IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT INTERPRETER PILAR ESPINOZA. DEFENDANT GARY ALIFF IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, MARIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIFF, GARY $9,187.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,262.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2024 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO APR-25-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIPO FLORES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GARY ALIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGES AND WAIVES SERVICE OF THE PETITIONER'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2024 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FLORES, MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT ALIFF, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE APPROVED***
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-18-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
